riskRules.name: 低风险普通咨询
riskRules.semanticDescription: 普通售前或产品基础咨询，不涉及投诉、退款、赔偿、平台处罚或强烈情绪。
riskRules.notes: 默认只生成草稿，由工作台决定是否允许后续动作。

riskRules.name: 低风险物流查询
riskRules.semanticDescription: 普通物流状态询问，不包含异常、催促、投诉或承诺诉求。
riskRules.notes: 仅确认收到并引导补充订单定位信息。

riskRules.name: 中风险客户不满
riskRules.semanticDescription: 客户表达不满、焦急或反复追问，但尚未明确投诉、退款、赔偿或法律威胁。
riskRules.notes: 生成草稿但需要人工审核。

riskRules.name: 中风险物流异常
riskRules.semanticDescription: 物流异常、延迟或客户催促履约，不能自动承诺发货或到货时间。
riskRules.notes: 需要人工核对物流状态。

riskRules.name: 高风险退款争议
riskRules.semanticDescription: 客户明确要求退款、退货或发生支付争议。
riskRules.notes: 禁止自动发送，进入人工处理。

riskRules.name: 高风险法律威胁
riskRules.semanticDescription: 涉及律师、法院、法律责任、欺诈或虚假宣传。

riskRules.name: 高风险平台投诉
riskRules.semanticDescription: 客户或平台官方提到投诉、处罚或平台介入。
riskRules.notes: 涉及平台声誉和处罚风险。

riskRules.name: 高风险差评威胁
riskRules.semanticDescription: 客户威胁差评或负面公开评价。
riskRules.notes: 品牌声誉风险，不能自动承诺。

riskRules.name: 低风险售前标准咨询
riskRules.semanticDescription: 售前基础咨询，可基于 FAQ 标准话术回复；不涉及订单状态、售后处理、退款、赔偿或物流事实核查。
riskRules.notes: 来自常见问题及回复话术.docx，作为低风险售前 FAQ 入口。

riskRules.name: 高风险售中订单履约
riskRules.semanticDescription: 售中订单履约、发货、物流、取消订单等问题需要核对仓库、订单或物流系统，禁止自动承诺。
riskRules.notes: 来自常见问题及回复话术.docx，命中后只允许人工审核后发送。

riskRules.name: 高风险售后手表问题
riskRules.semanticDescription: 售后包裹、质量、退换货、使用指导、表带和防水等问题均需要人工核对订单、证据、政策或附件。
riskRules.notes: 来自常见问题及回复话术.docx，作为售后高风险入口。

spamRules.name: 乱码邮件
spamRules.notes: 正文大量乱码或模板重复。

knowledgeBase.title: 普通产品咨询回复
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户询问产品基础信息。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: Hello, thank you for reaching out. We have received your product question. Please share the specific style, size, material or color you are interested in, and our support team will help confirm the details.
knowledgeBase.notes: 低风险产品咨询草稿。

knowledgeBase.title: 物流查询回复
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户询问物流或包裹状态。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: Hello, we have received your shipping inquiry. To avoid inaccurate information, please share your order number or order email if available, and our support team will check the latest shipping status.
knowledgeBase.notes: 物流状态需人工核对。

knowledgeBase.title: 发货延迟安抚回复
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户催促发货或物流长时间无更新。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: Hello, we understand your concern. We have received your message and will ask support to verify the order and shipping status before replying with confirmed information.
knowledgeBase.notes: 安抚但不承诺时效。

knowledgeBase.title: 退款咨询谨慎回复
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户询问退款或退货。
knowledgeBase.notes: 高风险只生成内部建议。

knowledgeBase.title: 投诉类内部建议
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 投诉、差评或平台投诉风险。
knowledgeBase.notes: 提醒人工核对平台规则和订单事实。

knowledgeBase.title: 高风险邮件禁止自动回复说明
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 法律、平台、拒付或品牌风险。
knowledgeBase.notes: 仅用于内部建议，不生成客户可见回复。

knowledgeBase.title: 售前：询问是否可送货
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户询问是否可以送货到某个国家、地区或地址。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 我们只可以送货到部分国家，你可以尝试通过我们的官网下单，如果可以成功下单，那么我们可以为你安排送货，否则无法送货。
knowledgeBase.notes: 支持直接确认送货的地区包括美、英、法、德、意、加拿大、澳洲、日、韩、港、澳、台、泰、菲律宾、马来西亚、新加坡、西班牙、葡萄牙、智利、阿根廷、墨西哥、荷兰、瑞典、瑞士、比利时、捷克、波兰、阿联酋、科威特、沙特、卡塔尔、巴林、南非等；其他地区使用标准回复。
knowledgeBase.standardReplyEn: We can only ship to selected countries and regions. You may try placing an order on our official website. If the order can be completed successfully, we can arrange delivery for you; otherwise, we are unable to ship to that address.

knowledgeBase.title: 售前：税费、海关费、运费
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户询问税费、海关费、运费或关税由谁承担。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 一般客户只需支付手表的费用，我们会直接发货到你的地址。税费和海关费由我们承担。订单满150美金我们提供免运费服务。
knowledgeBase.notes: 低风险售前 FAQ，可作为税费与运费口径。
knowledgeBase.standardReplyEn: In general, customers only need to pay for the watch, and we will ship it directly to your address. Taxes and customs fees are covered by us. We also offer free shipping for orders over USD 150.

knowledgeBase.title: 售前：询问送货时间
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户询问不同地区大概送货时间。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 欧盟地区6-10天，亚洲地区5-8天，港澳台2-4天，中东地区7-15天，东南亚6-9天，南美洲地区8-15天，北美地区6-9天，南非9-17天，澳洲6-10天。需根据客户询问的地址对应回复时间，具体送货时间取决于物流商。
knowledgeBase.notes: 只回答区域预估时效，不承诺具体日期。
knowledgeBase.standardReplyEn: Estimated delivery time depends on the destination: EU 6-10 days, Asia 5-8 days, Hong Kong/Macau/Taiwan 2-4 days, Middle East 7-15 days, Southeast Asia 6-9 days, South America 8-15 days, North America 6-9 days, South Africa 9-17 days, and Australia 6-10 days. The exact delivery time depends on the logistics provider.

knowledgeBase.title: 售前：原产地和发货地
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户询问手表原产地、制作地、团队或仓库所在地。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 您可以把你感兴趣的手表图片发送给我看下吗？我们的大部分手表机芯是从日本和瑞士采购的。表带从中国的工厂生产，然后在中国的仓库组装手表并发货。我们的团队在香港，我们在香港、中国大陆、阿联酋以及美国都有仓库。
knowledgeBase.notes: 涉及具体款式时，先让客户提供图片再回复。
knowledgeBase.standardReplyEn: Could you please send us a picture of the watch you are interested in? Most of our watch movements are sourced from Japan and Switzerland. The straps are produced by factories in China, and the watches are assembled and shipped from our warehouse in China. Our team is based in Hong Kong, and we have warehouses in Hong Kong, Mainland China, the UAE, and the United States.

knowledgeBase.title: 售前：店铺位置
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户询问是否有实体店、线下店或店铺位置。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 我们只有线上店，我们的团队在香港，我们在香港、中国大陆、阿联酋以及美国都有仓库。
knowledgeBase.notes: 明确只有线上店，不引导线下到访。
knowledgeBase.standardReplyEn: We only have an online store. Our team is based in Hong Kong, and we have warehouses in Hong Kong, Mainland China, the UAE, and the United States.

knowledgeBase.title: 售前：是否可以刻字
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户询问是否可以在手表背面刻字。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 我们可以在不锈钢手表的背面刻字。刻字字符是10-12个字符，刻字字体可以选择：Arial，ScriptC，Gothice。
knowledgeBase.notes: 低风险售前 FAQ；如客户提供具体刻字内容，仍建议人工抽查。
knowledgeBase.standardReplyEn: We can engrave text on the back of stainless steel watches. The engraving can be 10-12 characters, and the available fonts are Arial, ScriptC, and Gothice.

knowledgeBase.title: 售中：催发货
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户催促发货、询问出货或交货日期。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 非常抱歉，我和仓库核实了一下，最近由于订单量较大，因此导致手表组装速度较慢，因此发货延迟了，你的手表目前还在组装和测试阶段，我们预计本周内会为你发货，发货后，我们将通过电子邮件向您发送运单号，以便您追踪包裹的运送状态。
knowledgeBase.notes: 高风险：必须先与仓库确认。预售产品口径：生产时间约30天，生产完成后组装并测试，预计下周发货；具体时间须人工核实后再发送。

knowledgeBase.title: 售中：物流咨询
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户询问运单号、追踪信息或包裹物流。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 你的订单已经发货了，跟踪号码是[人工填写真实运单号]，你可以通过这个链接追踪物流信息：https://www.17track.net/en
knowledgeBase.notes: 高风险：必须从订单或物流系统核对真实运单号后发送，不得保留占位符。

knowledgeBase.title: 售中：取消订单
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户要求取消订单或取消并退款。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 得知您考虑取消订单，我们深表遗憾。能否请您告知具体情况及取消原因？您的反馈对我们至关重要，有助于我们更好地了解情况并改进服务。收到您的回复后，我们将很乐意为您提供进一步协助，并为您寻找最合适的解决方案。
knowledgeBase.notes: 高风险：取消与退款必须人工核对订单状态和政策。

knowledgeBase.title: 售中：物流异常
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户反馈物流停滞、几天未更新或包裹卡住。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 非常抱歉给您带来的不便，我查询到你的包裹目前在[人工填写地点]，但物流轨迹已经几天没更新了，我已经联系物流商请他们联系尾程服务商调查包裹并帮忙催促尽快安排运输了，请您再耐心等待一段时间，一旦有消息我们会尽快更新物流。
knowledgeBase.notes: 高风险：必须核对物流轨迹和地点，不得保留占位符。

knowledgeBase.title: 售后：包裹签收未收到
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 物流显示签收，但客户表示没有收到包裹。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 我查询了你的包裹信息，物流显示您的包裹已经签收了，附上物流商提供的签收证明供你查看。你能否查看一下监控，看下你的房子周围或者是邮箱，或者问问你的邻居或者家人是否收到了你的包裹？如果您在检查后仍无法找到包裹，请尽快告知我们，以便我们协助您联系物流服务商进行后续处理。
knowledgeBase.notes: 高风险：需核对签收证明并确认是否有附件。

knowledgeBase.title: 售后：质量不满
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户对质量不满、反馈缺陷或手表无法正常工作。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 非常抱歉给您带来的不便，你能否提供一些照片或者视频展示一下手表的问题，以便我们仔细检查手表的问题并尽快给您提供合适的解决方案？希望可以尽快帮助你解决问题并让您满意，请尽快提供所需的信息。
knowledgeBase.notes: 高风险：需客户提供照片或视频，人工判断处理方案。

knowledgeBase.title: 售后：退货
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户希望退回订单或咨询退货。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 得知您希望退回订单，我们深表遗憾。能否请您告知具体情况及退货原因？这些信息将有助于我们更好地了解您的状况，从而为您提供更快捷、更合适的解决方案。收到您的反馈后，我们将尽快协助您办理退货事宜。
knowledgeBase.notes: 高风险：需人工核对退货政策和订单状态。

knowledgeBase.title: 售后：换货
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户希望换成另一款手表。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 我们很乐意为你提供换货服务，请让我们知道你想换货成哪个手表，如果可以，请把图片发送给我们以便我们查看一下并核实是否有差价。
knowledgeBase.notes: 高风险：涉及换货和差价，必须人工审核。

knowledgeBase.title: 售后：调整时间和日期
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户询问如何调整手表时间或日期。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 随后附上一个关于调整日期和时间的指导视频，希望对你有帮助，请查收附件。
forbiddenExpressions: 附件已附上但实际未上传
knowledgeBase.notes: 高风险：必须确认指导视频或附件已准备好后再发送。

knowledgeBase.title: 售后：机械手表走时慢或运行时间短
keywords: only works for a few hours
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户反馈自动机械表走时慢、停走或运行时间短。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 自动机械手表需要佩戴8小时以上并且你的手腕活动要足够才能让手表储存够足够的能量。自动机械表依靠手腕的运动来储存能量。如果您每天佩戴时间少于8小时，或长时间不佩戴，主发条就会耗尽能量，导致手表走时变慢甚至停止。您是否可以试一下佩戴八小时，或者手动给手表上弦，大约转动40-50圈即可上满链，然后再观察一下效果吗？
knowledgeBase.notes: 高风险：涉及售后判断，需人工审核后发送。

knowledgeBase.title: 售后：手表防水
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户询问防水等级，或是否能戴着洗澡、游泳。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 我们的手表防水等级是3ATM，它可以防日常雨水和洗手时的水溅。不建议戴着它洗澡或者游泳。
knowledgeBase.notes: 高风险：可能涉及售后争议，需人工审核。

knowledgeBase.title: 售后：不锈钢表带尺寸过长或过短
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户反馈不锈钢表带太长或太短。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 如果表带太短：这个手表的表带是可调节的，你能否确认一下你一共需要几个额外的表链节？我们很乐意为你免费补发额外的表链节并发送到同一个地址给你。如果表带太长：这个手表的表带是可以拆下额外链节的，即使拆下额外链节，表带仍不适合你的手腕吗？你能否测量一下你的手腕尺寸，并告诉我们，我们很乐意询问仓库是否可以按照你的尺寸为你定制一条短表带。
knowledgeBase.notes: 高风险：涉及补发或定制，必须人工确认。

knowledgeBase.title: 售后：个人原因想退货
knowledgeBase.customerScenario: 客户因个人原因、不喜欢或不符合期望想退货。
knowledgeBase.standardReply: 很抱歉听到我们的手表没有达到您的期望。为了尽快解决问题，您是否愿意保留这个手表？我们很乐意给您提供10%的折扣，可以吗？此外，我们也可以为你提供换货服务，你对我们商店里的其他手表款式感兴趣吗？我们很乐意为你提供换货服务。
knowledgeBase.notes: 高风险：涉及折扣、挽留、换货或退货，必须人工确认。

promptTemplates.name: 风险判定提示词
promptTemplates.systemPrompt:
You are the risk and intent classifier for a customer service email agent.
Classify the email by business intent first, then assign spam, low, medium or high risk.
Low risk is limited to generic pre-sales FAQ questions that do not require order, warehouse, logistics, refund, return, exchange, compensation, legal or platform verification.
Any order-specific status, shipping fact, cancellation, refund, return, exchange, quality complaint, missing package, attachment-dependent answer, discount, compensation, legal threat, platform complaint or bad-review threat requires human review.
promptTemplates.taskPrompt:
Return a strict JSON object with spam, risk, matched rules, suggested action and human-review reason.
Use high risk when the agent would need to verify order data, logistics data, warehouse status, evidence, attachments, after-sales policy or financial decisions before replying.
Use medium risk for unclear intent, mild dissatisfaction or incomplete information that still needs a human check.
Use low risk only for standard pre-sales FAQ answers from the approved knowledge base.
promptTemplates.notes: 按“售前低风险、售中售后人工审核”的现有逻辑重写。

promptTemplates.name: 回复生成提示词
promptTemplates.systemPrompt:
You are the reply drafting skill inside an email agent.
The approved knowledge base is the primary reference standard. Preserve its facts, constraints, forbidden expressions and human-review flags.
Customer-facing replies must use the same language as the customer email. If the knowledge base standard reply is Chinese, translate it faithfully into the customer language without adding new facts.
Never fabricate order status, tracking numbers, warehouse checks, delivery dates, attachments, refund approvals, replacement approvals, discounts, compensation, legal conclusions or platform outcomes.
promptTemplates.taskPrompt:
Return strict JSON with reply.draft, reply.translationZh, reply.internalSuggestion and reply.tone.
For low-risk FAQ matches, draft a concise customer-facing reply based on the matched standardReply.
For medium or high risk, or when a matched knowledge entry has requireHumanReview=true, keep customer-facing commitments conservative. If facts must be verified or placeholders are present, leave draft empty and put the suggested handling plus matched standardReply in internalSuggestion.
Do not include placeholders such as 123, [tracking number], [人工填写], [附件] in a customer-facing draft.
Do not send or imply refunds, returns, exchanges, discounts, compensation, free reshipment, exact shipment time or fault admission unless a human has confirmed it.
promptTemplates.notes: 以知识库标准话术为主，支持全球语言同语种回复；中高风险默认内部建议。

promptTemplates.name: 输出格式提示词
promptTemplates.systemPrompt: Return a strict JSON object for the email workbench. Do not include markdown fences or prose outside JSON.
promptTemplates.taskPrompt:
The workbench parses spam, risk, reply, safety and finalAction from JSON.
Set safety.needHumanReview=true when the draft includes or depends on unverified order facts, logistics facts, attachments, refunds, returns, exchanges, discounts, compensation, legal statements, platform claims or placeholders.
Set safety.blocked=true when the draft contains forbidden promises, fabricated facts or customer-facing placeholders.

outputSafetyRules.name: 禁止承诺退款
outputSafetyRules.semanticDescription: 禁止在自动回复中承诺退款或退款时间。
outputSafetyRules.notes: 资金相关承诺必须人工审核。

outputSafetyRules.name: 禁止承诺赔偿
outputSafetyRules.semanticDescription: 禁止承诺赔偿、补偿或优惠。
outputSafetyRules.notes: 利益让渡必须人工确认。

outputSafetyRules.name: 禁止承诺补发
outputSafetyRules.semanticDescription: 禁止承诺补发或重新发货。
outputSafetyRules.notes: 补发需核对订单和售后规则。

outputSafetyRules.name: 禁止承认法律责任
outputSafetyRules.semanticDescription: 禁止承认法律责任或作出法律结论。
outputSafetyRules.notes: 法律风险必须人工处理。

outputSafetyRules.name: 禁止编造订单信息
outputSafetyRules.semanticDescription: 禁止在未核对系统时编造订单状态。
outputSafetyRules.notes: 订单信息必须从系统核对。

outputSafetyRules.name: 禁止编造物流信息
outputSafetyRules.semanticDescription: 禁止编造物流状态、物流单号或到货时间。
outputSafetyRules.notes: 物流必须核对后再回复。

outputSafetyRules.name: 禁止绝对化表达
outputSafetyRules.semanticDescription: 避免绝对化和过度承诺表达。

riskRulesSnapshot.name: 低风险普通咨询
riskRulesSnapshot.semanticDescription: 普通咨询，不涉及投诉、退款、赔偿、差评、平台处罚或严重情绪。

riskRulesSnapshot.name: 低风险物流查询
riskRulesSnapshot.semanticDescription: 普通物流状态询问，不包含异常、催促、投诉或承诺诉求。
riskRulesSnapshot.notes: 只确认收到并引导补充定位信息。

riskRulesSnapshot.name: 中风险客户不满
riskRulesSnapshot.semanticDescription: 客户表达不满、焦急或反复追问，但尚未明确投诉、退款、赔偿或法律威胁。

riskRulesSnapshot.name: 中风险物流异常
riskRulesSnapshot.semanticDescription: 物流异常、延迟或客户催促履约，不能自动承诺发货或到货时间。
riskRulesSnapshot.notes: 需要人工核对物流状态。

riskRulesSnapshot.name: 高风险退款争议
riskRulesSnapshot.semanticDescription: 客户明确要求退款、退货或发生支付争议。

riskRulesSnapshot.name: 高风险法律威胁
riskRulesSnapshot.semanticDescription: 涉及律师、法院、法律责任、欺诈或虚假宣传。

riskRulesSnapshot.name: 高风险平台投诉
riskRulesSnapshot.semanticDescription: 客户或平台官方提到投诉、处罚或平台介入。

riskRulesSnapshot.name: 高风险差评威胁
riskRulesSnapshot.semanticDescription: 客户威胁差评或负面公开评价。

spamRulesSnapshot.name: 乱码邮件
spamRulesSnapshot.notes: 正文大量乱码或模板重复。

knowledgeBaseSnapshot.title: 普通产品咨询回复
knowledgeBaseSnapshot.customerScenario: 客户询问产品基础信息。
knowledgeBaseSnapshot.standardReply: Hello, thank you for reaching out. We have received your product question. Please share the specific style, size, material or color you are interested in, and our support team will help confirm the details.

knowledgeBaseSnapshot.title: 物流查询回复
knowledgeBaseSnapshot.customerScenario: 客户询问物流或包裹状态。
knowledgeBaseSnapshot.standardReply: Hello, we have received your shipping inquiry. To avoid inaccurate information, please share your order number or order email if available, and our support team will check the latest shipping status.

knowledgeBaseSnapshot.title: 发货延迟安抚回复
knowledgeBaseSnapshot.customerScenario: 客户催促发货或物流无更新。
knowledgeBaseSnapshot.standardReply: Hello, we understand your concern. We have received your message and will ask support to verify the order and shipping status before replying with confirmed information.

knowledgeBaseSnapshot.title: 退款咨询谨慎回复
knowledgeBaseSnapshot.notes: 高风险只生成内部建议。

knowledgeBaseSnapshot.title: 投诉类内部建议
knowledgeBaseSnapshot.customerScenario: 投诉、差评或平台投诉风险。
knowledgeBaseSnapshot.notes: 提醒人工核对平台规则和订单事实。

knowledgeBaseSnapshot.title: 高风险邮件禁止自动回复说明
knowledgeBaseSnapshot.customerScenario: 法律、平台、拒付或品牌风险。

promptTemplatesSnapshot.name: 风险判定提示词
promptTemplatesSnapshot.systemPrompt: You classify customer emails into spam, low, medium or high risk.
promptTemplatesSnapshot.taskPrompt: Return spam, risk level, reasons, matched rules, suggested action and whether human review is required.
promptTemplatesSnapshot.notes: 默认 mock 风险判定提示词。

promptTemplatesSnapshot.name: 回复生成提示词
promptTemplatesSnapshot.systemPrompt: You draft cautious, polite support replies based on approved knowledge base entries.
promptTemplatesSnapshot.taskPrompt: Do not overpromise, admit liability, fabricate order or logistics data, or promise refund, compensation or reshipment.
promptTemplatesSnapshot.notes: 默认 mock 回复生成提示词。

promptTemplatesSnapshot.name: 输出格式提示词
promptTemplatesSnapshot.systemPrompt: Return strict JSON for the email workbench.
promptTemplatesSnapshot.taskPrompt: The workbench parses spam, risk, reply, safety and finalAction from JSON.

outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.name: 禁止承诺退款
outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.semanticDescription: 禁止在自动回复中承诺退款或退款时间。
outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.notes: 资金相关承诺必须人工审核。

outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.name: 禁止承诺赔偿
outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.semanticDescription: 禁止承诺赔偿、补偿或优惠。
outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.notes: 利益让渡必须人工确认。

outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.name: 禁止承诺补发
outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.semanticDescription: 禁止承诺补发或重新发货。
outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.notes: 补发需核对订单和售后规则。

outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.name: 禁止承认法律责任
outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.semanticDescription: 禁止承认法律责任或作出法律结论。
outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.notes: 法律风险必须人工处理。

outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.name: 禁止编造订单信息
outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.semanticDescription: 禁止在未核对系统时编造订单状态。
outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.notes: 订单信息必须从系统核对。

outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.name: 禁止编造物流信息
outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.semanticDescription: 禁止编造物流状态、物流单号或到货时间。
outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.notes: 物流必须核对后再回复。

outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.name: 禁止绝对化表达
outputSafetyRulesSnapshot.semanticDescription: 避免绝对化和过度承诺表达。

testInput.subject: Where is my order?
testInput.body: I want to know when my order will arrive.

reasons: 未命中明确低风险规则，默认按中风险交由人工确认。

reply.draft:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for reaching out regarding your order. I understand you’re eager to receive it.

To provide you with accurate information, could you please share your order number? This will allow me to check the current status and tracking details for you.

Please note that I can only share information based on our records and cannot guarantee specific delivery dates or make changes to shipping once an order is in transit.

I look forward to your reply so I can assist you further.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

reasons: 禁止绝对化表达: 避免绝对化和过度承诺表达。

testInput.subject: Where is my order?
testInput.body: I want to know when my order will arrive.

reasons: 未命中明确低风险规则，默认按中风险交由人工确认。

reply.draft:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for reaching out regarding your order. I understand you're eager to receive it.

To provide you with the most accurate information, could you please share your order number? This will allow me to check the current status and provide you with an update.

We appreciate your patience and will do our best to assist you.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team

testInput.subject: Where is my order?
testInput.body: I want to know when my order will arrive.

reasons: 未命中明确低风险规则，默认按中风险交由人工确认。

reply.draft:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for reaching out regarding your order. I understand you’re eager to receive it.

Based on the information available to me, I can see that your order is currently in transit. For the most accurate and up-to-date tracking details, please refer to the tracking number provided in your shipping confirmation email. If you have not received this email, it may be in your spam or junk folder.

If you have any further questions or need assistance with tracking, please let me know, and I’ll be happy to help.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team

reasons: 禁止编造物流信息: 禁止编造物流状态、物流单号或到货时间。

testInput.subject: Where is my order?
testInput.body: I want to know when my order will arrive.

reasons: 未命中明确低风险规则，默认按中风险交由人工确认。

reply.draft:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for reaching out regarding your order. I understand you're eager to receive it.

To provide you with the most accurate information, could you please share your order number or the email address used for the purchase? This will allow me to check the current status for you.

Please note that I can only provide updates based on the information available in our system. I will do my best to assist you.

Best regards,
[Your Name]

agentSkills.label: 全球语言识别与翻译
agentSkills.description: 识别客户来信语种，生成中文内部理解，并约束后续客户回复沿用客户语种。
agentSkills.notes: 输入：邮件主题、正文和历史摘要。输出：customerLanguage、translationZh、translationSource。边界：翻译只用于内部理解，不改写客户事实；无法识别语种时默认英文并提示人工确认。

agentSkills.label: 邮件分类与意图识别
agentSkills.description: 识别咨询、售中、售后、退款、投诉、垃圾邮件等意图，并给出风险等级和建议动作。
agentSkills.notes: 优先判垃圾邮件，再判业务意图。低风险限售前标准咨询；订单状态、物流事实、取消、退换货、质量、补发、折扣、法律、平台投诉和差评统一进入人工审核。

agentSkills.label: 知识库检索与依据选择
agentSkills.description: 按意图、关键词和风险等级检索 FAQ、政策、标准话术和禁用表达，作为回复主要依据。
agentSkills.notes: 优先使用常见问题及回复话术知识库；命中多条时按 priority 选择最高优先级。不得把未命中的内容当作事实；无依据时转人工或只生成收集信息话术。

agentSkills.label: 回复草稿生成
agentSkills.description: 基于客户语种、风险结果和知识库标准话术生成可审核草稿或内部处理建议。
agentSkills.notes: 低风险可生成客户可见草稿；中高风险优先生成内部建议。必须同语种回复，不编造订单、物流、仓库、附件、退款、补发、折扣、赔偿或法律结论。

agentSkills.label: 二次风险审核
agentSkills.description: 在生成后复查退款、法律、赔偿、补发、价格承诺、隐私、占位符和编造信息风险。
agentSkills.notes: 发现高风险、禁用表达、占位符、未核实运单号、未上传附件却引用附件、承认责任或利益承诺时，必须阻断自动发送并转人工。

agentSkills.label: 人工反馈学习
agentSkills.description: 记录人工改判、人工修改、发送/归档/恢复系统判定和转人工原因，沉淀后续优化样本。
agentSkills.notes: 保存人工原稿、AI 草稿、最终发送内容、风险改判、命中知识库和处理结果。后续用于优化关键词、知识库优先级和提示词边界。
